{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = King of Lions
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[King of Lions]] was crushed by an ice-blue arrow the size of a lighthouse.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c28">''Wintersteel'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
